---
title: "The Rev. Joseph Hemington Harris"
---

## The Rev. Joseph Hemington Harris

**Dates:** (1799/1800-25 June 1881)

### Description

Vicar of Tor Mohun and Cockington

### Biography

He married, first, Charlotte Collyer. She  died, probably in child birth in 1834 in Canada and H Joseph married (1837), also in Canada, Jane Yonge, CMY\'s father\'s first cousin.  His only child, the Rev. George Collyer Harris was born of the first marriage. The Rev.Joseph Harris was educated at St Paul’s School and St John’s College, Cambridge, Fellow of Clare Coll, Cambridge 1824-9, priest 1825, principal of Upper Canada College 1829-38, curate of Cockington 1845-8, of Tor Mohun 1848- his death. Died at Sorel, Torquay, [obituary <i>Guardian</i>  29 June 1881, 913 ]

### Letters

- Letter from [1865]
- Letter from Novr 23d 1861
- Letter from Novr 21st 1861
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
